message:
fix(scoring): reorder location checks so .tmp_ and .target match before generic /target

The contains("/target") check was a substring match that caught ".tmp_target_opus"
before the more specific contains("/.tmp_") check, giving 0.80 instead of 0.90.
Reorder: .tmp_ (0.90) > .target (0.85) > /target (0.80) so more specific patterns
take priority.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
